What to Wear

Guest Dress Code

Dear guests,

We are so looking forward to celebrating our wedding with you. The celebration will take place in a green garden overlooking the sea.

Our inspiration comes from shades of greenery, foliage, flowers, and fruits. Our palette features soft, natural tones: muted citrus, olive and herbal hues, warm woody shades, as well as delicate floral tones — powdery, peach, and creamy.

We would be delighted if you support this idea. At the same time, we kindly ask, if possible, to avoid overly contrasting and "pure" colours such as bright red, deep blue, neon pink, black, and white. We intentionally used watercolour in our invitation to convey the softness and natural feel of the palette. Most importantly, we want you to feel comfortable! The celebration will take place in a garden on grass, so high heels may not be the most practical choice.

Also, don't forget:
— sunglasses — for the photos and to hide happy tears,
— a light jacket or sweater for the evening — as it may get cool by the sea.

Дорогие гости,

Мы с нетерпением ждем вас на нашей свадьбе. Праздник пройдет в зеленом саду с видом на море.

Вдохновением для нас стали оттенки зелени, листвы, цветов и фруктов. В нашей палитре — мягкие природные тона: приглушенные цитрусовые, оливковые и травяные оттенки, теплые древесные, а также нежные цветочные — пудровые, персиковые, кремовые.

Мы будем рады, если вы поддержите нашу идею. При этом просим по возможности избегать слишком контрастных и «чистых» цветов — таких как ярко-красный, насыщенно-синий, неоновый розовый, черный и белый. На открытке мы специально использовали акварель, чтобы передать мягкость и естественность оттенков. Но самое главное, чтобы вам было удобно! Праздник будет проходить в саду, на траве, поэтому обувь на высоких каблуках может оказаться не самым комфортным вариантом.

Также не забудьте:
— солнцезащитные очки — для фотосессии и чтобы прятать радостные слезы,
— легкий пиджак или накидку/свитер на вечер — у моря может быть прохладно.

Stay Near the Beach

Where to Stay

Our picks — beachside, well-rated (9.0+), and easy to reach the venue from.

Beachfront · Petrovac na moru

Seafront Apartments Petrovac

Beachfront apartments right on Petrovac beach. Free WiFi, elevator, daily service.

9.2 Booking.com

Beachside · Buljarica

Hotel AQUILO

3-min walk from Buljarica Beach — the closest to our venue! Terrace restaurant, free parking.

9.0 Booking.com

Resort · Petrovac · Olive Grove

Vile Oliva Hotel & Resort

In a beautiful olive-tree park, 55 yards from the beach. Great food, lovely staff.

Hotel AMI Petrovac

5-star hotel with 2 pools, spa & wellness. Exceptional service, amazing sea views.

9.3 Booking.com

While You're Here

Our Favourite Places

Montenegro is small but extraordinary — if you have extra days, here's where we'd send you.

Perast

A perfectly preserved Baroque town on the Bay of Kotor, with two tiny islands just offshore.

Kotor Old Town

UNESCO-listed medieval walled city. Walk the walls for breathtaking views of the bay.

Pržno

A tiny fishing village 3 km from Petrovac. Pebble beach, seafood, and total tranquility.

Herceg Novi

The 'city of flowers' — Venetian fortresses, a lively promenade, brilliant sunsets.

Skadar Lake

The Balkans' largest lake — pelicans, water lilies, ancient monasteries. Absolutely serene.

Durmitor · Žabljak

Montenegro's wild mountain heart — Black Lake, Tara Canyon (Europe's deepest), dramatic peaks.

Ulcinj Old City

A dramatic clifftop old town with Ottoman character. Surrounded by sea on three sides.

Dobrota

A quiet Baroque village along the Bay of Kotor waterfront — stone palaces and gardens.

If you have any questions or doubts, please feel free to reach out — we'll be happy to help.

We can't wait to see you and are already looking forward to this wonderful weekend together!

Sasha & Stas
